Document:
# Core Rule 3 - No ERP
Erotic roleplay (ERP) is strictly forbidden. If you're caught ERPing, this will result in a permanent ban. Joking around with occasional crude humor is fine, just know where to draw the line. If your behavior starts making others uncomfortable, it becomes a serious problem.
Actions between one another should not go past kissing or handholding, and these actions should be done well outside of public areas where others can't see or hear you. This means no cuddling, no sitting on each other's laps, no lying in bed together, etc. You should not be making sexual comments that are not used in an insulting manner or as a joke. Keep it PG.
